full_text:
Xu Yin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Yin. Refused to allow Yang Hu out at night while Yin was alive. Led troops against Wu. Xu Yin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
